sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_least_operator (id UInt32, value1 Float64, value2 Float64, value3 Nullable(Int32));
SELECT id, least(value1, value2) AS min_value FROM test_least_operator WHERE value3 IS NULL;
SELECT id, least(value1, value2) AS min_value FROM test_least_operator WHERE least(value1, 4) < value2;
SELECT id, (SELECT least(value1, value2) FROM test_least_operator t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id) AS min_value FROM test_least_operator t1;
SELECT id, value1, value2, least(value1, value2) AS min_value FROM test_least_operator WHERE (value1 < value2) OR (least(value1, value2) > 0);
SELECT id, MIN(least(value1, value2)) AS min_of_all FROM test_least_operator GROUP BY id HAVING least(min_of_all, 3) < 5;
SELECT id, value1, value2, least(value1, value2) AS min_value, CASE WHEN least(value1, value2) IS NULL THEN 'NULL MIN' ELSE 'VALID' END AS status FROM test_least_operator WHERE value3 IS NULL;
SELECT id, least(value1, CAST(NULL AS Float64), value2) AS min_value FROM test_least_operator WHERE value1 = 1.0 AND value2 = 1.0;
SELECT id, least(value1 + value2, 10) AS adjusted_min_value FROM test_least_operator WHERE least(value1, value2) < 2 AND (value1 + value2) > 5;
